name: SecurityOfNodeGetOperationParameterKeys
title: SecurityOfNodeGetOperationParameterKeys
syntax: long SecurityOfNodeGetOperationParameterKeys(char nodeName[], char networkName[], long category, dword keyBuffer[], dword keyBufferLength)
description: Gets the list of operation parameter keys, supported by the currently loaded Security Source.
Which and how many operation parameters exist, which values are valid for an operation parameter differs from Security Source to Security Source.
Please refer to the Security Source specific manual to get more information about operation parameters. The manual can be opened from the Vector Security Manager on the OEM specific ribbon page.

parameters.name: char networkName[]
parameters.description: Name of the network in which the node is located.

parameters.name: long category
parameters.description: The category of the operation parameters, 0 = all operation parameters.

parameters.name: dword keyBuffer[]
parameters.description: The allocated buffer in which the operation parameter keys are written by the Security Source. [out]

parameters.name: dword keyBufferLength
parameters.description: The capacity of the keyBuffer [in], the number of operation parameter keys in the keyBuffer. [out]

return: A value of 1 means that the action was successful. A value less than or equal to 0 means error.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
